_meta.description: Sample geo-event corpus (GTD/GDELT-derived shape). Replace with the full 159,826-pair dataset on the deployment box; the Geo-Event agent reads whatever file GEO_CORPUS_PATH points at.
_meta.schema: region-year records with instability indicators, dominant modalities, target categories, and actor references
_meta.source: Global Terrorism Database (GTD) + GDELT — historical, to ~2020

records.threat_context_summary: Sustained insurgent activity in North Sinai dominated by IED and armed-assault modalities against military and police targets; elevated instability with recurring coordinated attacks.
Declining but persistent IED-centric threat against fixed military positions and checkpoints following counter-insurgency operations.
Low-frequency, high-visibility urban attacks targeting government and tourism, primarily attributed to small cell networks.
Active multi-actor conflict zone with very high instability; broad target set spanning military, civilian and critical infrastructure.
Expanding jihadist insurgency across the Mali-Niger-Burkina tri-border, with rising attacks on security forces and civilians.
